title: Street Urchin
description: Vin works as a lookout for Camon's thieving crew in the Luthadel slums, using her unknown Allomantic abilities to subtly influence those around her.

title: The Ministry Scam
description: Vin accompanies Camon's crew on a high-stakes con at the Canton of Finance, where her Allomantic pulses attract Kelsier's attention.

title: Recruited
description: After Kelsier rescues Vin from Camon's beating, she is brought to Clubs' carpentry shop—the crew's headquarters—and introduced to the plan to overthrow the Lord Ruler.

title: Mistborn Training
description: Kelsier takes Vin to the city walls near Steel Gate for her first real Allomancy training, teaching her to burn steel and iron among the dark rooftops.

title: The Renoux Estate
description: Vin travels west to Fellise to begin her cover as Lady Valette Renoux at Lord Renoux's country estate, preparing for infiltration of noble society.

title: Training with Sazed
description: Under Sazed's tutelage at the Renoux estate, Vin learns the etiquette, dance, and deportment necessary to pass as a noblewoman at the great house balls.

title: Return to the Crew
description: Vin returns to Luthadel from Fellise, rejoining the crew at Clubs' shop. Kelsier takes her on a nighttime Allomancy run through the city, pushing her training further.

title: The Warehouse Rally
description: Vin attends a secret rally in the warehouse district where Kelsier preaches revolution to gathered skaa workers, building the rebellion's momentum.

title: Camon's Lair Massacre
description: Vin and the crew discover the aftermath of a brutal attack on Camon's old lair—the Ministry has killed everyone inside as retribution for the Canton of Finance scam.

title: First Ball at Keep Venture
description: Vin attends her first ball as Lady Valette Renoux at Keep Venture. Among the nobility she catches a glimpse of her father, and meets Elend Venture reading Trials of Monument alone in a corner.

title: Return to Fellise
description: Vin returns to Lord Renoux's estate in Fellise with Kelsier and Sazed, debriefing on the intelligence gathered at her first ball.

title: Scouting Kredik Shaw
description: Vin and Kelsier make a daring nighttime reconnaissance of the Lord Ruler's palace, leaping between the Thousand Spires to map its defenses.

title: Ball at Keep Elariel
description: Vin attends a ball at House Elariel, gathering intelligence on the noble houses and their alliances while deepening her cover identity.

title: Growing Closer
description: At another ball at Keep Venture, Vin's relationship with Elend deepens despite her mission. She dances on the rooftops afterward.

title: The Logbook
description: Back at Clubs' Shop, Vin studies the Lord Ruler's ancient logbook, finding disturbing references to the Deepness and the Hero of Ages prophecy.

title: The Pewter Drag
description: When the rebel army at Holstep is massacred by garrison forces, Vin makes a desperate pewter drag—burning pewter continuously for hours—to reach the surviving soldiers hidden in the Arguois Caverns.

title: Recovery
description: Vin returns to Clubs' Shop exhausted from the pewter drag, recovering while the crew regroups from the devastating loss at Holstep.

title: House War Escalation
description: The House War intensifies as noble houses turn on each other. Vin realizes the crew's manipulation is working but the violence disturbs her.

title: The Survivor's Death
description: Vin watches helplessly from the rooftops as Kelsier fights and is killed by the Lord Ruler in Fountain Square, becoming the Survivor of Hathsin in death.

title: Assault on the Palace
description: Leading the skaa rebellion, Vin fights her way into Kredik Shaw, battling through Inquisitors and guards to reach the Lord Ruler's throne room.

title: Slayer of the Lord Ruler
description: Vin confronts the Lord Ruler in his throne room, tearing away his metalminds and killing the immortal tyrant. A thousand years of oppression end.

title: A New Era
description: In the aftermath of the revolution, Vin stands with Elend at Keep Venture as a new era begins. The mists still flow, but the Lord Ruler is gone.

title: City Guardian
description: Vin patrols the walls of Luthadel each night, watching for threats as three armies slowly converge on the newly free city.

title: The Mist Spirit
description: During her nightly patrol, Vin encounters a mysterious figure in the mists—a spirit that seems to be watching her, pointing toward something.

title: Protector and Partner
description: Vin navigates her dual role as Elend's protector and partner at the palace, struggling between her love for him and her duty to keep him safe.

title: Crew Council
description: The crew meets at Clubs' Shop to discuss strategy as Straff Venture's army camps to the north and Cett's forces approach from the west.

title: Political Tensions
description: As the siege tightens, Vin watches Elend struggle with the Assembly and the demands of governance while she hunts Zane through the mists.

title: Parley with Straff
description: Vin accompanies Elend to Straff Venture's war camp north of the city, where she demonstrates her terrifying power to intimidate the would-be conqueror.

title: Return from Parley
description: After the tense encounter at Straff's camp, Vin returns to Keep Venture, haunted by Zane's whispers and her growing doubts about her role.

title: The Assembly Crisis
description: Vin watches from the gallery as the Assembly votes to depose Elend and invite Lord Penrod to lead, shattering the democratic experiment.

title: Raid on Cett
description: Vin launches a devastating solo assault on Cett's forces quartered at Keep Hasting, driving his army from the city in a display of Mistborn power.

title: Duel with Zane
description: Near Keep Hasting, Vin duels Zane Venture in a brutal Mistborn battle, ultimately killing him to protect those she loves.

title: Exile
description: Vin and Elend depart Luthadel through the Tin Gate, exiled by Penrod's new government, heading north toward Terris with a small escort.

title: Exodus North
description: The small party travels toward Terris, but Vin senses something pulling her back—the Well of Ascension is not in the mountains after all.

title: Return to Battle
description: Vin makes a desperate pewter drag back to Luthadel as koloss breach the walls, arriving in time to take control of the creatures and save the city.

title: Searching for the Well
description: With Luthadel saved but battered, Vin searches beneath Kredik Shaw for the Well of Ascension, following the mist spirit's guidance deeper underground.

title: The Well Discovered
description: Vin descends into the ancient caverns beneath Kredik Shaw and discovers the Well of Ascension, its power pulsing with accumulated energy.

title: The Power Released
description: At the Well, Vin takes up immense power—then, deceived by Ruin's manipulation of the prophecies, releases it. Something terrible escapes its prison.

title: The Northern Campaign
description: Vin and Elend lead their army to Vetitan, a city being buried by escalating ashfall, to secure one of the Lord Ruler's hidden storage caches.

title: The First Cache
description: Vin opens the Vetitan storage cavern, finding food, supplies, and a metal plate with a cryptic message from the Lord Ruler about the danger he imprisoned.

title: Dividing Forces
description: Vin returns to Luthadel where the army splits: Sazed and Breeze head north to Urteau, while Vin and Elend will march west to Fadrex City.

title: Marching West
description: Vin marches west with Elend's army toward Fadrex City, the ash falling heavier each day as the world deteriorates around them.

title: Arrival at Fadrex
description: The army arrives outside Fadrex City and establishes a siege camp on the ash-covered plains. Obligator Yomen refuses to surrender the city or its cache.

title: The Spy at the Ball
description: Vin infiltrates Fadrex disguised as a noblewoman, attending one of Yomen's balls at Keep Orielle to gather intelligence and seek a diplomatic solution.

title: Second Ball
description: Vin returns to another of Yomen's balls, engaging him directly in philosophical debate about the Lord Ruler's legacy and the growing ashfall.

title: Captured
description: Vin is captured by Yomen's forces and imprisoned in the Canton of Resource, her metals stripped. She is held in a cell with an atium stash she cannot reach.

title: In the Prison
description: Imprisoned and cut off from her metals, Vin contemplates Ruin's influence and the nature of the power she released at the Well.

title: The Cache Revealed
description: Vin discovers the Fadrex storage cache and its critical contents—food, supplies, and a message about the Lord Ruler's true preparations.

title: Escape from Fadrex
description: As koloss attack Fadrex, Vin escapes the city, drawing the Inquisitors away from Elend and the army to protect them.

title: Leading the Hunt
description: Vin flies eastward toward Luthadel with a pack of Inquisitors pursuing her, deliberately drawing Ruin's servants away from Fadrex and Elend.

title: Return to Luthadel
description: Vin arrives in a devastated Luthadel and destroys Kredik Shaw, collapsing the Lord Ruler's palace in a massive display of Allomantic power.

title: Ascending
description: Vin draws upon the mists themselves—Preservation's body—ascending to become a vessel of divine power to fight Ruin directly.

title: The Last Sacrifice
description: Vin sacrifices herself to destroy Ruin, combining Preservation's power with her own life force to annihilate the god of destruction.

title: The Field of Rebirth
description: Vin's body is found in a field of flowers and green grass—the first signs of Sazed's remade world. She lies at peace beside Elend.
